hero.description: One account, connected everywhere. Secure, clean, seamless identity management experience.
features.label: Features
features.description: From account creation to permission management, every detail is carefully designed. Beneath the simple exterior lies a robust security system.
feature.identitySecurity.name: Identity Security
feature.identitySecurity.desc: Encrypted protection, passwords are never stored in plaintext. Password changes take effect immediately, and all actions are logged.
feature.profile.name: Profile
feature.profile.desc: Customize your username, avatar, and email address. Your account, fully yours.
feature.thirdParty.name: Third-Party Authorization
feature.thirdParty.desc: View and manage all authorized third-party applications. Revoke access at any time, take control of your data.
feature.activityLog.name: Activity Log
feature.activityLog.desc: Complete record of all account activities. Suspicious login? Detect immediately and respond quickly.
feature.microsoft.name: Microsoft Integration
feature.microsoft.desc: Seamless integration with Microsoft accounts. Unified management, one-click access to all ecosystem services.
feature.dataExport.name: Data Export
feature.dataExport.desc: Export your complete data at any time. Your information is always in your control, never locked in.
manifesto.text1: We believe authentication shouldn't be a burden. It should be invisible, reliable, like air—there when you need it, never in your way.
manifesto.text2: Nebula Studios account system is built from scratch, rejecting bloated solutions. Every line of code has a purpose, every interaction is polished repeatedly.
manifesto.text3: Security isn't a feature, it's infrastructure. Privacy isn't an option, it's the default. This is our promise to every user.
cta.description: Sign up with just an email. No credit card required, no hidden fees. Get full account functionality immediately.
cta.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
